title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0386
summary: Following the arrest of three individuals and recovery of 150 kg of poppy husk, co-accused Harwinder Singh @ Mintu disclosed that the contraband was to be delivered to Rinku Singh @ Gagan, who had deposited Rs.1,32,000 in Harwinder's bank account. Based on this, Rinku was nominated as an accused.
